optionOpenFront.message: Open new tabs in the foreground (disabling opens them in the background)

optionOpenEnd.message: Place new tabs at the end of the tab strip (disabling opens them next to the current tab)

extensionDescription.message: Double-click any link to open it in a new tab.

thankBody.message: Try double-clicking the links on this page to see how it works.

optionYouTubeFix.message: Enable advanced compatibility mode for YouTube

optionYouTubeFixHelper.message: Solves single-click issues on video previews. This enables complex, site-specific logic. Keep it off unless you experience problems on YouTube.

optionHighPerformanceModeHelper.message: Keeps the extension's background process active to eliminate new tab delays. May slightly increase memory usage.
